headline: Steel Dynamics Announces Second Quarter 2026 Cash Dividend
summary: Steel Dynamics, Inc. (NASDAQ/GS: STLD) today announced that the company's board of directors declared a second quarter cash dividend of $0.53 per common share. The dividend is payable to shareholders of record at the close of business on June 30, 2026 and is payable on or about July 10, 2026.
